title: [Nyessem, Ring Loop]
description: The tunnel does not have a natural curve, its architects instead favoring a more severe jutting toward either direction away.  At the far corner of this turning point, a round hollow has been carved out of the angular corner to serve as a standing bar.  A wide stone shelf fused to the wall is laden with delights and offers a companionable place for several chairs to be pushed up against.  Opposite the shelf, a pastel oil painting of Nyessemian revelry is prominently displayed.
